title: Reference Counting, Weak References, and Cycles · Memory Trace: Refcount Overflow Underflow
summary: A document graph shares nodes across views and leaks after parent-child cycles appear. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem refcount overflow underflow increment in overflow-safe reference-counted graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent count overflow, underflow, resurrection, and release reentrancy with explicit states.
Maintain a reference count equal to defined strong ownership edges and release exactly when the last edge ends.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
